CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS _content_info (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, "ready" BOOLEAN, "structureVersion" VARCHAR, "version" VARCHAR, "__hash__" TEXT UNIQUE); -- structure
INSERT INTO _content_info VALUES ('checksum_projects_en', false, 'IGwVYii5wPZ36wk6H8cWPo_t1_ts_xlTPEw6K5jQhxI', 'v3.5.0--UlpX9U-jdpGlxkf5pEV1CLZuv1_jY44EMwsCHiexjKQ', 'xlOj-M4JB1oBCecV1cuG79HTqr0n4LUwfPPB2zwR62w'); -- meta
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS _content_projects_en; -- structure
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS _content_projects_en (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, "title" VARCHAR, "architecture" VARCHAR, "body" TEXT, "category" VARCHAR, "challenge" VARCHAR, "company" VARCHAR, "description" VARCHAR, "extension" VARCHAR, "featured" BOOLEAN DEFAULT false, "meta" TEXT, "metrics" TEXT NULL, "navigation" TEXT DEFAULT true, "order" INT DEFAULT 0, "path" VARCHAR, "period" VARCHAR, "results" VARCHAR, "role" VARCHAR, "seo" TEXT DEFAULT '{}', "stack" TEXT, "status" VARCHAR, "stem" VARCHAR, "__hash__" TEXT UNIQUE); -- structure
INSERT INTO _content_projects_en VALUES ('projects_en/en/projects/banking-modernization.md', 'Banking Platform Modernization', 'Decomposed the monolith into 40+ Spring Boot microservices using Banco Nacional''s YAPE framework. Each service owned its database (polyglot persistence: PostgreSQL for transactions, Redis for sessions, MongoDB for audit logs). Inter-service communication via REST for synchronous flows and Apache Kafka for event-driven operations. Deployed on Kubernetes with blue-green deployments via GitHub Actions CI/CD.', '{"type":"minimark","value":[["h2",{"id":"challenge"},"Challenge"],["p",{},"Banco Nacional del Perú''s online banking platform was a monolith that buckled under load. Peak-hour traffic (payroll processing, bill payments) caused transaction timeouts. Deployments required coordinated downtime — the team shipped once every 3 weeks."],["p",{},"The business needed:"],["ul",{},["li",{},"Real-time transaction processing at scale"],["li",{},"Independent deployment of banking features"],["li",{},"Zero-downtime releases"]],["h2",{"id":"architecture"},"Architecture"],["p",{},["strong",{},"Decomposition strategy"],": Identified bounded contexts (accounts, transfers, payments, auth, notifications) and extracted each as a Spring Boot microservice using the YAPE framework — Banco Nacional''s internal microservice standard."],["p",{},["strong",{},"Data architecture"],": Each service owned its database:"],["ul",{},["li",{},"PostgreSQL for transactional services (ACID required)"],["li",{},"Redis for session management and rate limiting"],["li",{},"MongoDB for audit logs (write-heavy, schema-flexible)"]],["p",{},["strong",{},"Communication"],":"],["ul",{},["li",{},"Synchronous: REST for request/response flows (balance check, transfer initiation)"],["li",{},"Asynchronous: Apache Kafka for event-driven flows (transaction completed → notification → audit)"]],["p",{},["strong",{},"Deployment"],": Kubernetes with blue-green strategy. GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline ran integration tests, built containers, and promoted to production with a single approval gate."],["h2",{"id":"results"},"Results"],["ul",{},["li",{},["strong",{},"Latency"],": Critical path (transfer confirmation) dropped from 2.4s to 0.65s — a 73% reduction"],["li",{},["strong",{},"Throughput"],": Platform sustains 12M requests/day, up from 4M"],["li",{},["strong",{},"Uptime"],": 99.97% — up from 99.2% (the 0.77% delta was mostly planned downtime eliminated)"],["li",{},["strong",{},"Deployment frequency"],": From every 3 weeks to multiple times per day"],["li",{},["strong",{},"MTTR"],": From 4 hours to 12 minutes (Kubernetes health checks + auto-restart)"]]],"toc":{"title":"","searchDepth":2,"depth":2,"links":[{"id":"challenge","depth":2,"text":"Challenge"},{"id":"architecture","depth":2,"text":"Architecture"},{"id":"results","depth":2,"text":"Results"}]}}', 'banking', 'Legacy monolithic banking platform couldn''t handle peak-hour traffic. Transactions timed out. Deployment cycles took weeks.', 'Globant', 'Modernized online banking with microservices using the YAPE framework', 'md', true, '{}', '[{"label":"Latency","value":"-73%"},{"label":"Throughput","value":"12M req/day"}]', 'true', 2, '/en/projects/banking-modernization', '2021-2023', 'Latency dropped 73% on critical paths. Platform handles 12M requests/day with 99.97% uptime. Deployment cycle reduced from 3 weeks to 2 hours.', 'Java Microservices Developer', '{"title":"Banking Platform Modernization","description":"Modernized online banking with microservices using the YAPE framework"}', '["Java","Spring Boot","Microservices","YAPE Framework","Kubernetes"]', 'shipped', 'en/projects/banking-modernization', 'QPi1zVM5onPb9u14KJUqjpVErZpcgZuJLrtYTd51zes'); -- QPi1zVM5onPb9u14KJUqjpVErZpcgZuJLrtYTd51zes
INSERT INTO _content_projects_en VALUES ('projects_en/en/projects/batch-payment-infrastructure.md', 'Batch Payment Infrastructure', 'Rebuilt batch processing with Spring Batch + Kafka. Chunk-oriented processing (1000 records per chunk) with checkpointing. Kafka topics for dead-letter queues — failed records retried automatically. Parallel step execution for independent job flows.', '{"type":"minimark","value":[["h2",{"id":"challenge"},"Challenge"],["p",{},"Disney''s batch processing for invoicing and cinema payments was a nightly 6+ hour operation. If the batch failed at hour 4, the entire run restarted from zero — no checkpointing. Operations team was on-call every night during batch windows."],["h2",{"id":"architecture"},"Architecture"],["p",{},["strong",{},"Spring Batch"],": Replaced the monolithic batch script with chunk-oriented processing. Each chunk processed 1,000 records with transactional integrity — failures only re-processed the failed chunk, not the entire batch."],["p",{},["strong",{},"Kafka dead-letter queue"],": Records that failed business validation were sent to a Kafka DLQ topic. A retry consumer processed them with exponential backoff (1s, 5s, 30s, 2m, 10m) — transient failures self-healed without manual intervention."],["p",{},["strong",{},"Parallel execution"],": Independent job flows (invoicing vs cinema payments) ran in parallel — cutting wall-clock time."],["p",{},["strong",{},"Monitoring"],": Custom Micrometer metrics exposed batch progress, throughput, and failure rates to Prometheus."],["h2",{"id":"results"},"Results"],["ul",{},["li",{},["strong",{},"Batch window"],": 6h → 1.2h — 80% reduction"],["li",{},["strong",{},"Throughput"],": 2M records per batch run"],["li",{},["strong",{},"Manual intervention"],": Eliminated — DLQ + retry handles all transient failures"],["li",{},["strong",{},"On-call burden"],": Operations team no longer needed during batch windows"],["li",{},["strong",{},"Recovery"],": Failed chunk restarts in seconds, not hours"]]],"toc":{"title":"","searchDepth":2,"depth":2,"links":[{"id":"challenge","depth":2,"text":"Challenge"},{"id":"architecture","depth":2,"text":"Architecture"},{"id":"results","depth":2,"text":"Results"}]}}', 'media', 'Invoicing and cinema payment batch jobs took 6+ hours nightly. Failed batches delayed next-day operations. No retry mechanism — failures required manual intervention.', 'Globant', 'Co-developed batch processing infrastructure for invoicing and cinema payments', 'md', true, '{}', '[{"label":"Batch window","value":"-80%"},{"label":"Records/batch","value":"2M"}]', 'true', 4, '/en/projects/batch-payment-infrastructure', '2019-2021', 'Batch window reduced from 6 hours to 1.2 hours. Processes 2M records per batch. Failed records auto-retry with exponential backoff — manual intervention eliminated.', 'Java Microservices Developer', '{"title":"Batch Payment Infrastructure","description":"Co-developed batch processing infrastructure for invoicing and cinema payments"}', '["Java","Spring Batch","Kafka","Oracle","Microservices"]', 'shipped', 'en/projects/batch-payment-infrastructure', '9N0yjFWea_KHHU1wgpIXWVRsL4ERbkTjU7cbT0Bi71U'); -- 9N0yjFWea_KHHU1wgpIXWVRsL4ERbkTjU7cbT0Bi71U
INSERT INTO _content_projects_en VALUES ('projects_en/en/projects/financial-microservices-k8s.md', 'Financial Microservices on Kubernetes', 'Migrated Spring Boot microservices to Quarkus with native compilation (GraalVM). Deployed to Google Kubernetes Engine with horizontal pod autoscaling. GitHub Actions pipelines built native binaries, pushed to GCR, and deployed with Helm. Kafka handled inter-service events for transaction flows.', '{"type":"minimark","value":[["h2",{"id":"challenge"},"Challenge"],["p",{},"The existing financial microservices ran on Spring Boot with traditional JVM. Startup time was 8 seconds. During low-traffic hours (nights, weekends), pods kept running — burning cloud budget for nothing. Scaling events were slow because new pods took 8s to become ready."],["h2",{"id":"architecture"},"Architecture"],["p",{},["strong",{},"Quarkus native compilation"],": Migrated services to Quarkus with GraalVM native images. Startup dropped from 8s to 40ms. Memory footprint shrank from 512MB to 80MB per pod."],["p",{},["strong",{},"Google Kubernetes Engine"],": Deployed with Helm charts. Horizontal Pod Autoscaler scaled on CPU + custom Kafka lag metrics. Scale-to-zero enabled for non-critical services during off-hours."],["p",{},["strong",{},"GitHub Actions CI/CD"],":"],["ol",{},["li",{},"PR opened → run unit tests + integration tests"],["li",{},"Merge to main → build native binary (GraalVM) in CI"],["li",{},"Push to Google Container Registry"],["li",{},"Helm upgrade with rolling deployment"]],["p",{},["strong",{},"Event streaming"],": Apache Kafka for inter-service communication — transaction events, audit trails, and reconciliation flows."],["h2",{"id":"results"},"Results"],["ul",{},["li",{},["strong",{},"Cold start"],": 8s → 40ms (200x faster) — enables true scale-to-zero"],["li",{},["strong",{},"Infrastructure cost"],": -40% — idle pods shut down during off-hours"],["li",{},["strong",{},"Memory per pod"],": 512MB → 80MB — 6x density improvement"],["li",{},["strong",{},"Deployment time"],": From 15 min manual process to 3 min automated pipeline"],["li",{},["strong",{},"Scaling response"],": From 8s to sub-second — HPA reacts instantly to traffic spikes"]]],"toc":{"title":"","searchDepth":2,"depth":2,"links":[{"id":"challenge","depth":2,"text":"Challenge"},{"id":"architecture","depth":2,"text":"Architecture"},{"id":"results","depth":2,"text":"Results"}]}}', 'fintech', 'Financial microservices on JVM had slow startup times — deployment scaling was expensive. Cloud spend was rising. CI/CD was manual.', 'Globant', 'Built and maintained financial microservices with Quarkus and Kubernetes on Google Cloud, automating deployments with GitHub Actions', 'md', true, '{}', '[{"label":"Cold start","value":"0.04s"},{"label":"Infra cost","value":"-40%"}]', 'true', 3, '/en/projects/financial-microservices-k8s', '2020-2022', 'Cold start dropped from 8s to 40ms — enabling scale-to-zero. Infrastructure cost reduced 40% by shutting down idle pods. CI/CD fully automated — zero manual deployments.', 'Java Microservices Developer', '{"title":"Financial Microservices on Kubernetes","description":"Built and maintained financial microservices with Quarkus and Kubernetes on Google Cloud, automating deployments with GitHub Actions"}', '["Java","Quarkus","Kubernetes","Google Cloud","GitHub Actions","Kafka"]', 'shipped', 'en/projects/financial-microservices-k8s', 'QvmnzzM1MSbJRhLlkkJXzNpIGRQKo8VXX6EXGk7cySU'); -- QvmnzzM1MSbJRhLlkkJXzNpIGRQKo8VXX6EXGk7cySU
INSERT INTO _content_projects_en VALUES ('projects_en/en/projects/hsbc-digital-banking.md', 'Digital Banking Expansion', 'Expanded the microservice ecosystem with event-driven services. Introduced a feature-flag system for progressive rollouts. Kafka event store enabled CQRS for read-optimized dashboards.', '{"type":"minimark","value":[["h2",{"id":"challenge"},"Challenge"],["p",{},"HSBC needed to ship digital banking features faster. The existing microservice platform had grown organically, but each new feature required coordinated releases across 8 teams. A single bad deployment could affect all customers."],["h2",{"id":"architecture"},"Architecture"],["p",{},["strong",{},"Event-driven expansion"],": New services subscribed to domain events from the existing Kafka event store. No direct database coupling — services could be built and deployed independently."],["p",{},["strong",{},"Feature flags"],": Implemented a feature-flag service backed by Redis. New features were hidden behind flags and progressively rolled out: 5% (internal testing) → 25% (canary) → 100% (general availability). Bad features could be killed instantly without redeployment."],["p",{},["strong",{},"CQRS for dashboards"],": Read-heavy dashboards (account summary, transaction history) used a CQRS pattern — events from the write side were projected into optimized read models. Dashboards queried pre-built projections instead of aggregating on the fly."],["h2",{"id":"results"},"Results"],["ul",{},["li",{},["strong",{},"15+ features shipped"]," in 18 months — previously would have taken 3+ years at old cadence"],["li",{},["strong",{},"Time-to-market"],": 3 months → 3 weeks per feature"],["li",{},["strong",{},"Zero-downtime releases"],": Feature flags enabled instant rollback"],["li",{},["strong",{},"Dashboard latency"],": CQRS projections reduced query time from 2s to 200ms"]]],"toc":{"title":"","searchDepth":2,"depth":2,"links":[{"id":"challenge","depth":2,"text":"Challenge"},{"id":"architecture","depth":2,"text":"Architecture"},{"id":"results","depth":2,"text":"Results"}]}}', 'banking', 'HSBC''s digital banking platform needed new features fast — but the existing architecture required coordinated releases across 8 teams. Time-to-market for new features was 3+ months.', 'Globant', 'Expanded microservices and modernized its digital banking platform', 'md', false, '{}', '[{"label":"Features shipped","value":"15+"},{"label":"Time to market","value":"-65%"}]', 'true', 5, '/en/projects/hsbc-digital-banking', '2020-2022', 'Shipped 15+ new banking features in 18 months. Time-to-market reduced from 3 months to 3 weeks. Feature flags enabled safe progressive rollout to 5% → 25% → 100% of users.', 'Java Microservices Developer', '{"title":"Digital Banking Expansion","description":"Expanded microservices and modernized its digital banking platform"}', '["Java","Spring Boot","Microservices","Kafka","Redis"]', 'shipped', 'en/projects/hsbc-digital-banking', 'MkSDrXTqtYRlyKTCStM4wGdEtnN65OzPTE3uZ-e-I-A'); -- MkSDrXTqtYRlyKTCStM4wGdEtnN65OzPTE3uZ-e-I-A
INSERT INTO _content_projects_en VALUES ('projects_en/en/projects/quizzer-ai-interview-system.md', 'QuizzerA — AI Interview System', 'Built a GPT-powered interview assistant as a Spring Boot microservice. The system captured interview transcripts, generated structured feedback using custom GPT prompts, and routed results through an event-driven pipeline via Apache Kafka. A follow-up scheduler automated the next steps — no manual triage needed.', '{"type":"minimark","value":[["h2",{"id":"challenge"},"Challenge"],["p",{},"Interview feedback at scale was the bottleneck. With hundreds of candidates across multiple clients, interviewers spent more time documenting than evaluating. Feedback quality varied wildly between interviewers — some wrote paragraphs, others wrote bullet points. Candidates waited up to a week for results."],["h2",{"id":"architecture"},"Architecture"],["p",{},"The system was built as a Spring Boot microservice integrated into the existing Globant hiring platform:"],["ol",{},["li",{},["strong",{},"Transcript capture"]," — Interview recordings transcribed via a speech-to-text service, sent to the microservice via REST"],["li",{},["strong",{},"GPT processing"]," — Custom GPT prompts evaluated transcripts against role-specific rubrics, generating structured JSON feedback"],["li",{},["strong",{},"Event pipeline"]," — Results published to Apache Kafka topics, consumed by the notification service and the follow-up scheduler"],["li",{},["strong",{},"Follow-up automation"]," — A scheduled job checked pending feedback, sent reminders, and escalated stale items"]],["h2",{"id":"results"},"Results"],["ul",{},["li",{},"Feedback cycle reduced from 5 business days to under 48 hours"],["li",{},"Interview throughput tripled — same team handled 3x candidate volume"],["li",{},"Feedback consistency improved — GPT-enforced structure eliminated ad-hoc formatting"],["li",{},"Hiring manager satisfaction up — structured JSON enabled dashboard analytics"]]],"toc":{"title":"","searchDepth":2,"depth":2,"links":[{"id":"challenge","depth":2,"text":"Challenge"},{"id":"architecture","depth":2,"text":"Architecture"},{"id":"results","depth":2,"text":"Results"}]}}', 'ai', 'Interview feedback was slow, inconsistent, and manual. CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS _content_info (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, "ready" BOOLEAN, "structureVersion" VARCHAR, "version" VARCHAR, "__hash__" TEXT UNIQUE); -- structure

INSERT INTO _content_projects_es VALUES ('projects_es/es/projects/banking-modernization.md', 'Modernización de Plataforma Bancaria', 'Descompuse el monolito en 40+ microservicios Spring Boot usando el framework YAPE. Cada servicio era dueño de su base de datos (poliglota: PostgreSQL, Redis, MongoDB). Comunicación REST para flujos síncronos y Kafka para event-driven. Desplegado en Kubernetes con blue-green deployments vía GitHub Actions.', '{"type":"minimark","value":[["h2",{"id":"reto"},"Reto"],["p",{},"La plataforma de banca en línea del Banco Nacional del Perú era un monolito que colapsaba bajo carga. El tráfico en horas pico (procesamiento de nómina, pago de servicios) causaba timeouts. Los despliegues requerían downtime coordinado — el equipo liberaba cada 3 semanas."],["h2",{"id":"arquitectura"},"Arquitectura"],["p",{},["strong",{},"Estrategia de descomposición"],": Identifiqué contextos acotados (cuentas, transferencias, pagos, auth, notificaciones) y extraje cada uno como microservicio Spring Boot con el framework YAPE."],["p",{},["strong",{},"Arquitectura de datos"],": Cada servicio era dueño de su base de datos:"],["ul",{},["li",{},"PostgreSQL para servicios transaccionales (ACID)"],["li",{},"Redis para sesiones y rate limiting"],["li",{},"MongoDB para logs de auditoría (escritura intensiva, esquema flexible)"]],["p",{},["strong",{},"Comunicación"],":"],["ul",{},["li",{},"Síncrona: REST para flujos request/response"],["li",{},"Asíncrona: Apache Kafka para operaciones event-driven"]],["p",{},["strong",{},"Despliegue"],": Kubernetes con estrategia blue-green. INSERT INTO _content_projects_es VALUES ('projects_es/es/projects/batch-payment-infrastructure.md', 'Infraestructura de Pagos Batch', 'Reconstruí el procesamiento batch con Spring Batch + Kafka. Procesamiento orientado a chunks (1000 registros por chunk) con checkpointing. Kafka topics para dead-letter queues — registros fallidos con retry automático.', '{"type":"minimark","value":[["h2",{"id":"reto"},"Reto"],["p",{},"El procesamiento batch de facturación y pagos de cine era una operación nocturna de 6+ horas. Si el batch fallaba a la hora 4, todo se reiniciaba desde cero — sin checkpointing. El equipo de operaciones estaba on-call cada noche."],["h2",{"id":"arquitectura"},"Arquitectura"],["p",{},["strong",{},"Spring Batch"],": Procesamiento orientado a chunks. Cada chunk procesaba 1,000 registros con integridad transaccional — las fallas solo reprocesaban el chunk fallido."],["p",{},["strong",{},"Kafka dead-letter queue"],": Registros que fallaban validación de negocio iban a un topic DLQ. Un consumer de retry los procesaba con backoff exponencial."],["p",{},["strong",{},"Ejecución paralela"],": Flujos independientes (facturación vs pagos de cine) corrían en paralelo."],["p",{},["strong",{},"Monitoreo"],": Métricas custom de Micrometer expuestas a Prometheus."],["h2",{"id":"resultados"},"Resultados"],["ul",{},["li",{},["strong",{},"Ventana batch"],": 6h → 1.2h (80% de reducción)"],["li",{},["strong",{},"Throughput"],": 2M registros por ejecución"],["li",{},["strong",{},"Intervención manual"],": Eliminada — DLQ + retry maneja fallas transitorias"],["li",{},["strong",{},"On-call"],": Equipo de operaciones ya no necesario durante batches"],["li",{},["strong",{},"Recuperación"],": Chunk fallido reinicia en segundos, no horas"]]],"toc":{"title":"","searchDepth":2,"depth":2,"links":[{"id":"reto","depth":2,"text":"Reto"},{"id":"arquitectura","depth":2,"text":"Arquitectura"},{"id":"resultados","depth":2,"text":"Resultados"}]}}', 'media', 'Los jobs batch de facturación y pagos de cine tomaban 6+ horas nocturnas. Los batches fallidos retrasaban operaciones del día siguiente. INSERT INTO _content_projects_es VALUES ('projects_es/es/projects/financial-microservices-k8s.md', 'Microservicios Financieros en Kubernetes', 'Migré microservicios Spring Boot a Quarkus con compilación nativa (GraalVM). Desplegado en Google Kubernetes Engine con autoscaling horizontal. Pipelines de GitHub Actions compilaban binarios nativos y desplegaban con Helm. Kafka para eventos entre servicios.', '{"type":"minimark","value":[["h2",{"id":"reto"},"Reto"],["p",{},"Los microservicios financieros corrían en Spring Boot con JVM tradicional. Tiempo de arranque: 8 segundos. Durante horas de bajo tráfico, los pods seguían corriendo — quemando presupuesto cloud. Los eventos de escalado eran lentos."],["h2",{"id":"arquitectura"},"Arquitectura"],["p",{},["strong",{},"Compilación nativa Quarkus"],": Migré servicios a Quarkus con imágenes nativas GraalVM. Arranque de 8s a 40ms. Memoria por pod de 512MB a 80MB."],["p",{},["strong",{},"Google Kubernetes Engine"],": Despliegue con Helm charts. HPA escaló por CPU + métricas custom de lag de Kafka. Scale-to-zero para servicios no críticos."],["p",{},["strong",{},"GitHub Actions CI/CD"],":"],["ol",{},["li",{},"PR → tests unitarios + integración"],["li",{},"Merge → build nativo (GraalVM)"],["li",{},"Push a Google Container Registry"],["li",{},"Helm upgrade con rolling deployment"]],["p",{},["strong",{},"Event streaming"],": Apache Kafka para comunicación entre servicios."],["h2",{"id":"resultados"},"Resultados"],["ul",{},["li",{},["strong",{},"Cold start"],": 8s → 40ms (200x más rápido) — scale-to-zero real"],["li",{},["strong",{},"Costo de infra"],": -40% — pods inactivos se apagan"],["li",{},["strong",{},"Memoria por pod"],": 512MB → 80MB — 6x más densidad"],["li",{},["strong",{},"Tiempo de despliegue"],": 15 min manual → 3 min automatizado"],["li",{},["strong",{},"Respuesta de escalado"],": 8s → sub-segundo"]]],"toc":{"title":"","searchDepth":2,"depth":2,"links":[{"id":"reto","depth":2,"text":"Reto"},{"id":"arquitectura","depth":2,"text":"Arquitectura"},{"id":"resultados","depth":2,"text":"Resultados"}]}}', 'fintech', 'Los microservicios financieros en JVM tenían arranque lento — escalar era caro. El gasto en cloud subía. CI/CD era manual.', 'Globant', 'Construcción y mantenimiento de microservicios financieros con Quarkus y Kubernetes en Google Cloud, automatizando despliegues con GitHub Actions', 'md', true, '{}', '[{"label":"Cold start","value":"0.04s"},{"label":"Costo infra","value":"-40%"}]', 'true', 3, '/es/projects/financial-microservices-k8s', '2020-2022', 'Cold start de 8s a 40ms — habilitando scale-to-zero. Costo de infraestructura reducido 40%. INSERT INTO _content_projects_es VALUES ('projects_es/es/projects/hsbc-digital-banking.md', 'Expansión de Banca Digital', 'Expansión del ecosistema de microservicios con servicios event-driven. Sistema de feature flags para rollouts progresivos. Kafka event store habilitó CQRS para dashboards optimizados.', '{"type":"minimark","value":[["h2",{"id":"reto"},"Reto"],["p",{},"HSBC necesitaba lanzar features de banca digital más rápido. Cada nuevo feature requería releases coordinados entre 8 equipos. Un mal despliegue podía afectar a todos los clientes."],["h2",{"id":"arquitectura"},"Arquitectura"],["p",{},["strong",{},"Expansión event-driven"],": Nuevos servicios se suscribían a eventos de dominio del Kafka event store. Sin acoplamiento directo a bases de datos."],["p",{},["strong",{},"Feature flags"],": Servicio de feature flags con Redis. Nuevos features ocultos detrás flags con rollout progresivo: 5% (testing interno) → 25% (canary) → 100%."],["p",{},["strong",{},"CQRS para dashboards"],": Dashboards read-heavy usaron CQRS — eventos del lado de escritura proyectados en modelos de lectura optimizados."],["h2",{"id":"resultados"},"Resultados"],["ul",{},["li",{},["strong",{},"15+ features"]," lanzadas en 18 meses"],["li",{},["strong",{},"Time-to-market"],": 3 meses → 3 semanas por feature"],["li",{},["strong",{},"Releases sin downtime"],": Feature flags permiten rollback instantáneo"],["li",{},["strong",{},"Latencia de dashboards"],": Proyecciones CQRS redujeron query time de 2s a 200ms"]]],"toc":{"title":"","searchDepth":2,"depth":2,"links":[{"id":"reto","depth":2,"text":"Reto"},{"id":"arquitectura","depth":2,"text":"Arquitectura"},{"id":"resultados","depth":2,"text":"Resultados"}]}}', 'banking', 'La plataforma de banca digital de HSBC necesitaba features rápido — pero la arquitectura existente requería releases coordinados entre 8 equipos. Un scheduler automatizaba los siguientes pasos.', '{"type":"minimark","value":[["h2",{"id":"reto"},"Reto"],["p",{},"El feedback de entrevistas a escala era el cuello de botella. Con cientos de candidatos en múltiples clientes, los entrevistadores pasaban más tiempo documentando que evaluando. La calidad del feedback variaba — algunos escribían párrafos, otros viñetas. Los candidatos esperaban hasta una semana."],["h2",{"id":"arquitectura"},"Arquitectura"],["ol",{},["li",{},["strong",{},"Captura de transcripciones"]," — Grabaciones transcritas vía speech-to-text, enviadas al microservicio por REST"],["li",{},["strong",{},"Procesamiento GPT"]," — Prompts personalizados evaluaron transcripciones contra rúbricas específicas por rol, generando feedback JSON estructurado"],["li",{},["strong",{},"Pipeline de eventos"]," — Resultados publicados en topics de Apache Kafka, consumidos por el servicio de notificaciones y el scheduler de seguimiento"],["li",{},["strong",{},"Automatización de seguimiento"]," — Job programado verificaba feedback pendiente, enviaba recordatorios y escalaba items obsoletos"]],["h2",{"id":"resultados"},"Resultados"],["ul",{},["li",{},"Ciclo de feedback: 5 días → menos de 48 horas"],["li",{},"Throughput de entrevistas: 3x por entrevistador"],["li",{},"Consistencia de feedback: estructura GPT eliminó formatos ad-hoc"],["li",{},"Satisfacción de hiring managers: JSON estructurado habilitó analítica en dashboards"]]],"toc":{"title":"","searchDepth":2,"depth":2,"links":[{"id":"reto","depth":2,"text":"Reto"},{"id":"arquitectura","depth":2,"text":"Arquitectura"},{"id":"resultados","depth":2,"text":"Resultados"}]}}', 'ai', 'El feedback de las entrevistas era lento, inconsistente y manual. CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS _content_info (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, "ready" BOOLEAN, "structureVersion" VARCHAR, "version" VARCHAR, "__hash__" TEXT UNIQUE); -- structure

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS _content_blog_en (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, "title" VARCHAR, "body" TEXT, "date" VARCHAR, "description" VARCHAR, "draft" BOOLEAN DEFAULT false, "extension" VARCHAR, "meta" TEXT, "navigation" TEXT DEFAULT true, "path" VARCHAR, "readingTime" INT NULL, "seo" TEXT DEFAULT '{}', "stem" VARCHAR, "tags" TEXT DEFAULT '[]', "__hash__" TEXT UNIQUE); -- structure
INSERT INTO _content_blog_en VALUES ('blog_en/en/blog/resilient-microservices.md', 'Building Resilient Microservices: Lessons from Banking at Scale', '{"type":"minimark","value":[["h1",{"id":"building-resilient-microservices"},"Building Resilient Microservices"],["p",{},"After modernizing two major banking platforms, I''ve learned that the hardest part isn''t the technology — it''s the organizational and data boundaries."],["h2",{"id":"start-with-bounded-contexts"},"Start with Bounded Contexts"],["p",{},"The biggest mistake teams make is splitting by technical layer (controller/service/repository) instead of business domain. When we decomposed Banco Nacional''s monolith, we identified 7 bounded contexts first:"],["ul",{},["li",{},["strong",{},"Accounts"]," — balance, account history"],["li",{},["strong",{},"Transfers"]," — internal and external transfers"],["li",{},["strong",{},"Payments"]," — bill pay, scheduled payments"],["li",{},["strong",{},"Auth"]," — session, OAuth, 2FA"],["li",{},["strong",{},"Notifications"]," — push, SMS, email"],["li",{},["strong",{},"Audit"]," — regulatory logging"],["li",{},["strong",{},"Reconciliation"]," — end-of-day settlement"]],["p",{},"Each became a microservice. Each owned its database. No shared tables."],["h2",{"id":"polyglot-persistence-is-real"},"Polyglot Persistence Is Real"],["p",{},"Not every service needs PostgreSQL. We used:"],["ul",{},["li",{},"PostgreSQL for ACID-required flows (transfers, payments)"],["li",{},"Redis for session state and rate limiting"],["li",{},"MongoDB for audit logs (write-heavy, schema-flexible)"],["li",{},"Kafka as the event backbone"]],["p",{},"This reduced cost and improved fit-for-purpose. But it introduced operational complexity — you need observability tooling that works across data stores."],["h2",{"id":"deployment-strategy-matters-more-than-you-think"},"Deployment Strategy Matters More Than You Think"],["p",{},"Blue-green deployments saved us more than once. The pattern:"],["ol",{},["li",{},"Deploy new version to green environment (0% traffic)"],["li",{},"Run smoke tests against green"],["li",{},"Shift 10% traffic to green (canary)"],["li",{},"Monitor error rate for 5 minutes"],["li",{},"Shift 100% or rollback — decision in < 10 minutes"]],["p",{},"This is impossible with a monolith. With microservices, it''s routine."],["h2",{"id":"the-real-cost-of-microservices"},"The Real Cost of Microservices"],["p",{},"Microservices aren''t free. You pay in:"],["ul",{},["li",{},["strong",{},"Operational complexity"]," — distributed tracing, service mesh, log aggregation"],["li",{},["strong",{},"Network latency"]," — every cross-service call adds 5-20ms"],["li",{},["strong",{},"Eventual consistency"]," — you can''t do a JOIN across services"],["li",{},["strong",{},"Testing"]," — contract tests, integration tests, end-to-end tests"]],["p",{},"The payoff: independent deployment, independent scaling, fault isolation. For banking at scale, the trade-off is worth it."]],"toc":{"title":"","searchDepth":2,"depth":2,"links":[{"id":"start-with-bounded-contexts","depth":2,"text":"Start with Bounded Contexts"},{"id":"polyglot-persistence-is-real","depth":2,"text":"Polyglot Persistence Is Real"},{"id":"deployment-strategy-matters-more-than-you-think","depth":2,"text":"Deployment Strategy Matters More Than You Think"},{"id":"the-real-cost-of-microservices","depth":2,"text":"The Real Cost of Microservices"}]}}', '2024-12-15', 'What I learned modernizing banking platforms — from monolith to 40+ microservices handling 12M requests/day.', false, 'md', '{}', 'true', '/en/blog/resilient-microservices', 8, '{"title":"Building Resilient Microservices: Lessons from Banking at Scale","description":"What I learned modernizing banking platforms — from monolith to 40+ microservices handling 12M requests/day."}', 'en/blog/resilient-microservices', '["microservices","banking","architecture","kubernetes"]', 'lu7zm10mHWYTOUct3pM90yxzp2lKOsCc6lWfUJGLh4M'); -- lu7zm10mHWYTOUct3pM90yxzp2lKOsCc6lWfUJGLh4M

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS _content_info (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, "ready" BOOLEAN, "structureVersion" VARCHAR, "version" VARCHAR, "__hash__" TEXT UNIQUE); -- structure

INSERT INTO _content_blog_es VALUES ('blog_es/es/blog/resilient-microservices.md', 'Microservicios Resilientes: Lecciones de Banca a Escala', '{"type":"minimark","value":[["h1",{"id":"microservicios-resilientes"},"Microservicios Resilientes"],["p",{},"Después de modernizar dos plataformas bancarias, aprendí que lo más difícil no es la tecnología — son los límites organizacionales y de datos."],["h2",{"id":"empieza-con-bounded-contexts"},"Empieza con Bounded Contexts"],["p",{},"El error más grande es dividir por capa técnica en lugar de dominio de negocio. Cuando descompuse el monolito del Banco Nacional, identificamos 7 bounded contexts:"],["ul",{},["li",{},["strong",{},"Cuentas"]," — balance, historial"],["li",{},["strong",{},"Transferencias"]," — internas y externas"],["li",{},["strong",{},"Pagos"]," — pago de servicios, programados"],["li",{},["strong",{},"Auth"]," — sesión, OAuth, 2FA"],["li",{},["strong",{},"Notificaciones"]," — push, SMS, email"],["li",{},["strong",{},"Auditoría"]," — logging regulatorio"],["li",{},["strong",{},"Conciliación"]," — liquidación fin de día"]],["p",{},"Cada uno se convirtió en un microservicio. Cada uno era dueño de su base de datos. Sin tablas compartidas."],["h2",{"id":"persistencia-poliglota-es-real"},"Persistencia Poliglota Es Real"],["p",{},"No todos los servicios necesitan PostgreSQL. Usamos:"],["ul",{},["li",{},"PostgreSQL para flujos ACID (transferencias, pagos)"],["li",{},"Redis para sesiones y rate limiting"],["li",{},"MongoDB para logs de auditoría"],["li",{},"Kafka como backbone de eventos"]],["h2",{"id":"la-estrategia-de-despliegue-importa-más-de-lo-que-crees"},"La Estrategia de Despliegue Importa Más de lo que Crees"],["p",{},"Blue-green deployments nos salvaron más de una vez:"],["ol",{},["li",{},"Desplegar nueva versión a entorno green (0% tráfico)"],["li",{},"Smoke tests contra green"],["li",{},"Shift 10% del tráfico a green (canary)"],["li",{},"Monitorear error rate por 5 minutos"],["li",{},"Shift 100% o rollback — decisión en < 10 minutos"]],["h2",{"id":"el-costo-real-de-los-microservicios"},"El Costo Real de los Microservicios"],["p",{},"Los microservicios no son gratis. Pagas en:"],["ul",{},["li",{},["strong",{},"Complejidad operacional"]," — distributed tracing, service mesh, log aggregation"],["li",{},["strong",{},"Latencia de red"]," — cada llamada cross-service añade 5-20ms"],["li",{},["strong",{},"Consistencia eventual"]," — no puedes hacer un JOIN entre servicios"],["li",{},["strong",{},"Testing"]," — contract tests, integration tests, end-to-end tests"]],["p",{},"El beneficio: despliegue independiente, escalado independiente, aislamiento de fallas. Para banca a escala, el trade-off vale la pena."]],"toc":{"title":"","searchDepth":2,"depth":2,"links":[{"id":"empieza-con-bounded-contexts","depth":2,"text":"Empieza con Bounded Contexts"},{"id":"persistencia-poliglota-es-real","depth":2,"text":"Persistencia Poliglota Es Real"},{"id":"la-estrategia-de-despliegue-importa-más-de-lo-que-crees","depth":2,"text":"La Estrategia de Despliegue Importa Más de lo que Crees"},{"id":"el-costo-real-de-los-microservicios","depth":2,"text":"El Costo Real de los Microservicios"}]}}', '2024-12-15', 'Lo que aprendí modernizando plataformas bancarias — de monolito a 40+ microservicios manejando 12M peticiones/día.', false, 'md', '{}', 'true', '/es/blog/resilient-microservices', 8, '{"title":"Microservicios Resilientes: Lecciones de Banca a Escala","description":"Lo que aprendí modernizando plataformas bancarias — de monolito a 40+ microservicios manejando 12M peticiones/día."}', 'es/blog/resilient-microservices', '["microservicios","banca","arquitectura","kubernetes"]', '596qMWmJQE_gW6Ia5IFf566tmVLT0dPohVFL7-R7AX4'); -- 596qMWmJQE_gW6Ia5IFf566tmVLT0dPohVFL7-R7AX4
